mapper.select: select parallel_enabled, rewrite_enabled, intent_aware_vector_enabled, fts_weight, refkey_weight, article_chunk_weight, source_weight, source_chunk_weight, fact_card_weight, contribution_weight, graph_weight, article_vector_weight, chunk_vector_weight, rrf_k from query_retrieval_settings where id = 1
mapper.insert: insert into query_retrieval_settings ( id, parallel_enabled, rewrite_enabled, intent_aware_vector_enabled, fts_weight, refkey_weight, article_chunk_weight, source_weight, source_chunk_weight, fact_card_weight, contribution_weight, graph_weight, article_vector_weight, chunk_vector_weight, rrf_k, updated_at ) values ( 1, #{state.parallelEnabled}, #{state.rewriteEnabled}, #{state.intentAwareVectorEnabled}, #{state.ftsWeight}, #{state.refkeyWeight}, #{state.articleChunkWeight}, #{state.sourceWeight}, #{state.sourceChunkWeight}, #{state.factCardWeight}, #{state.contributionWeight}, #{state.graphWeight}, #{state.articleVectorWeight}, #{state.chunkVectorWeight}, #{state.rrfK}, current_timestamp ) on conflict (id) do update set parallel_enabled = excluded.parallel_enabled, rewrite_enabled = excluded.rewrite_enabled, intent_aware_vector_enabled = excluded.intent_aware_vector_enabled, fts_weight = excluded.fts_weight, refkey_weight = excluded.refkey_weight, article_chunk_weight = excluded.article_chunk_weight, source_weight = excluded.source_weight, source_chunk_weight = excluded.source_chunk_weight, fact_card_weight = excluded.fact_card_weight, contribution_weight = excluded.contribution_weight, graph_weight = excluded.graph_weight, article_vector_weight = excluded.article_vector_weight, chunk_vector_weight = excluded.chunk_vector_weight, rrf_k = excluded.rrf_k, updated_at = current_timestamp
